note: Multi-day stories the briefs are tracking, so a big story from Monday is still visible Wednesday. Maintained by the morning-brief / evening-recap skills each run. Each story: { title, startedDate (YYYY-MM-DD, when we first tracked it), lastUpdate, status, latest (one-line current state), tickers (optional) }. status: 'live' = still developing; 'closing' = resolved/faded, renders one final time then the NEXT run deletes it. No fixed day count — a story drops when the skill judges it resolved or no longer moving the watchlist. Start empty; the skill fills it.

stories.title: SpaceX IPO debut
stories.latest: Trades today; retail piled in despite 'stupid valuation' calls. Space names bid as proxies to 'get long SpaceX'.

stories.title: Iran-US peace deal / Hormuz reopening
stories.latest: Trump signals the war is ending; proposed deal reopens the Strait of Hormuz and lifts oil sanctions. Crude down ~3%, broad risk bid.

stories.title: Nasdaq-100 June quarterly adds
stories.latest: RKLB, NBIS, CoreWeave, Astera Labs and Teradyne added in the reshuffle; index-inclusion buying lifting the names.

stories.title: Bitcoin demand softness
stories.latest: BTC stuck near $63k, crypto fear gauge at extreme fear (12). Analysts flag 'AI buildout weighs on BTC demand' and a $48k max-pain case.
